author: haradaiko100
description: Automatically converts pasted URLs to reference-style markdown links with page titles. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Yuki Nagashima
manifest.description: Automatically converts pasted URLs to reference-style markdown links with page titles.
manifest.name: Paste link with title
